heroSection.title: Hi, I'm Manoj — Aspiring Developer & AI Enthusiast
heroSection.text: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a college student passionate about building web applications, exploring artificial intelligence, and sharing my learning journey. Here you'll find my projects, blogs, and interactive experiments that showcase my growth as a developer and innovator.
heroSection.timing: Feel free to call or message me between 7 AM and 10 PM. I’m always happy to assist you with your orders.
heroSection.address: Akshya Nagar 1st Block 1st Cross, Rammurthy nagar, Bangalore-560016

items.text: Student union representative and environmental advocate. Organizes campus sustainability drives while balancing a double major in Economics and Political Science.

sections.title: My Proud Achievements
sections.description: Every award here tells a story of my hard work and passion—take a look!
